TypeSignature.Value: .class public interface auto ansi abstract beforefieldinit IAgentThreadRepository

Docs.summary: An interface for managing the persistence of agent threads.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentThread> Get (string? conversationId, Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent? agent = default);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Threading.Tasks.Task`1<class Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentThread> Get(string conversationId, class Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent agent) cil managed
Public Function Get (conversationId As String, Optional agent As AIAgent = Nothing) As Task(Of AgentThread)

Docs.param: Conversation ID for the thread. When null, a new stateless thread is created.
Optional. Agent instance to associate with the thread. If provided, this agent will be used for the thread.
Docs.summary: Gets an AgentThread instance based on the provided conversation ID.
Docs.returns: An AgentThread instance associated with the given conversation ID. If the conversation ID does not exist, a new AgentThread is created and returned. If the conversation ID is null, a new stateless thread is returned.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Threading.Tasks.Task Set (string? conversationId, Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentThread thread);
.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Threading.Tasks.Task Set(string conversationId, class Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentThread thread) cil managed
Public Function Set (conversationId As String, thread As AgentThread) As Task
abstract member Set : string * Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentThread -> System.Threading.Tasks.Task

Docs.param: The conversation Id related to the AgentThread. When null, the operation is a no-op.
Docs.summary: Sets the AgentThread instance for the given conversation ID.
